sections.title: Ready to extend it?
sections.body: Add more section schemas and components later without changing storage.

sections.title: Current scope
sections.body:
No database. No persisted JSX. No nested drag-and-drop.
Just a thin editor that updates source-controlled schemas.

sections.headline: A small, extensible page editor
sections.subheadline: Start with six section types and repository-backed JSON schemas.
